name: Joan-clode
description: Advisory scorer over deterministic routing output. Produces confidence and concise reasoning only. Operates as the advisory_scoring stage in resolver.runtime.json.

scoring_rules.name: single_match_clear_signal
scoring_rules.reasoning_template: Deterministic route has a single candidate and no novelty indicators.

scoring_rules.name: multiple_candidates
scoring_rules.reasoning_template: Deterministic routing produced multiple valid responsibilities. Jean-Claude finalization required.

scoring_rules.name: no_candidate
scoring_rules.reasoning_template: No deterministic route matched; assignment requires first-principles finalization by Jean-Claude.

scoring_rules.name: first_occurrence_penalty
scoring_rules.reasoning_template: First occurrence lowers certainty despite a single deterministic candidate.

scoring_rules.name: critical_bypass
scoring_rules.reasoning_template: Critical severity follows escalation bypass; scoring is advisory and non-blocking.
